name: logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month, inefficient route planning causes increased fuel costs. We provide optimized routing instead of manual route planning and basic telematics analysis.
problem_solved: Inefficient route planning and fuel usage
